name: WF_Link Pagamento v2 - Multi-experience resource Homologacao_RC

nodes.name: HTTP Request: Gerar Embedding do navio
Code: Extrair vetor e preparar inputs

parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    (metadata->>'qtd_adultos')::int  AS qtd_adultos,
    (metadata->>'qtd_criancas')::int AS qtd_criancas,
    (metadata->>'qtd_adultos')::int + (metadata->>'qtd_criancas')::int AS capacidade
FROM vetor_link_pagamento_homologacao
WHERE 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) >= 0.44
ORDER BY capacidade DESC;

nodes.name: Code: Calcular distribuicao de experience resource

parameters.query:
SELECT
    metadata->>'navio'        AS navio,
    metadata->>'link_reserva' AS link_reserva,
    metadata->>'observacoes'  AS observacoes,
    metadata->>'qtd_adultos'  AS qtd_adultos,
    metadata->>'qtd_criancas' AS qtd_criancas,
    (metadata->>'tem_criancas')::boolean AS tem_criancas,
    1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM vetor_link_pagamento_homologacao
WHERE
    (metadata->>'qtd_adultos')::int  = $2
    AND (metadata->>'qtd_criancas')::int = $3
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: PostgreSQL: Busca vetorial por experience resource
